title: AuthMeAutoLogin
description: Logins on all players automatically after a reloading
body:
# AuthMeAutoLogin

By default, after server reloadings, AuthMe causes bug due your players cant move because they need to login, this plugin just fixes this issue by logging all players in with AuthMe's command "authme forcelogin \<player\>"

Requirements:
- Spigot 1.17.1 (or newer)
- Java 17 (or newer)
- AuthMe (must be with command "authme forcelogin \<player\>")
